d3e1_a.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_a.text: Day 3! Your team is growing. One of your staff members comes to you this morning looking stressed. Something is clearly wrong.

d3e1_b.speaker: Staff
d3e1_b.text: Boss, I've been feeling really overwhelmed lately. The workload is too much and I'm making mistakes with the laundry. I don't know how much longer I can keep this up.

choices.text: Listen carefully and adjust their workload
Tell them to push through — it gets better
Offer a small bonus for their hard work
Suggest they take a day off to recover

d3e1_c_listen.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_listen.text: Thank you for hearing me out. Just knowing you care makes such a difference. I feel better already.

d3e1_c_push.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_push.text: I... okay. I'll try. Sorry for bringing it up.

d3e1_c_bonus.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_bonus.text: Oh wow, thank you! That really means a lot. I'll keep giving my best!

d3e1_c_dayoff.speaker: Staff
d3e1_c_dayoff.text: Really? A day off? Thank you so much. I'll come back recharged and ready!

d3e1_result_listen.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_listen.text: Active listening is a superpower in leadership. Adjusting workload prevents burnout and keeps your best people around.

d3e1_result_push.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_push.text: Dismissing staff concerns breeds resentment. Burned-out employees make more mistakes and eventually quit.

d3e1_result_bonus.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_bonus.text: Financial recognition motivates but doesn't solve the root problem. Pair rewards with workload reviews for best results.

d3e1_result_dayoff.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_result_dayoff.text: Rest is productive! A recovered employee outperforms an exhausted one every time. Smart investment.

d3e1_a_loyal.speaker: Regular Customer
d3e1_a_loyal.text: Remember that discount you gave me on Day 1? I told everyone! I brought five friends today. This laundromat is everything I said it was.

d3e1_loyal_b.speaker: You
d3e1_loyal_b.text: The loyalty discount I gave on Day 1 just brought in five new customers at once. Word of mouth is real.

choices.text: Offer the whole group a welcome discount too
Welcome them warmly — no extra discount needed
Thank the regular and serve everyone normally

d3e1_loyal_c_extend.speaker: New Customers
d3e1_loyal_c_extend.text: A welcome discount AND great service? We're absolutely coming back. This place is special.

d3e1_loyal_c_welcome.speaker: New Customers
d3e1_loyal_c_welcome.text: The warmth here is exactly what we heard about. No wonder our friend raves about this place.

d3e1_loyal_c_normal.speaker: Regular Customer
d3e1_loyal_c_normal.text: See? I told you all. Same great service every single time. Consistency is everything.

d3e1_loyal_result_extend.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_loyal_result_extend.text: Your Day 1 generosity just multiplied. One small discount became five new customers. This is how loyalty programs work.

d3e1_loyal_result_welcome.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_loyal_result_welcome.text: Warmth without financial cost is powerful. Your Day 1 investment in loyalty is paying dividends.

d3e1_loyal_result_normal.speaker: Mentor
d3e1_loyal_result_normal.text: Consistency is its own reward. Your Day 1 decision built trust, and that trust is now walking through your door.

d3r_review_event.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_event.text: A major review site just reached out wanting to feature local laundromats. This is unexpected but could be huge.

d3r_review_b.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_b.text: We're featuring top local businesses this month. Your laundromat kept coming up in our research. Would you be open to a feature?

choices.text: Absolutely — say yes immediately
Ask what the feature involves first
Decline politely — not ready yet

d3r_review_c_yes.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_c_yes.text: Wonderful! We'll send a photographer tomorrow. This feature reaches 200,000 readers monthly.

d3r_review_c_ask.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_c_ask.text: Smart to ask! It's a full-page feature with photos and an interview. Very positive coverage.

d3r_review_c_decline.speaker: Reviewer
d3r_review_c_decline.text: No pressure. We'll check back next quarter.

d3r_review_result_yes.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_result_yes.text: Seizing media opportunities when they come is bold and smart. Your reputation just got a massive amplifier.

d3r_review_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_result_ask.text: Due diligence before committing is always wise. You got the full picture and made an informed yes.

d3r_review_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3r_review_result_decline.text: Knowing your limits is valid, but make sure you're not letting fear pose as preparation.

d3r_staff_birthday.speaker: Staff
d3r_staff_birthday.text: Boss! Today is one of our team member's birthday. The whole team is hoping we can do something small to celebrate during the break.

choices.text: Organize a surprise during break — on you
Give them the afternoon off as a gift
Wish them happy birthday and continue working

d3r_birthday_c_surprise.speaker: Birthday Staff
d3r_birthday_c_surprise.text: I had no idea! This is the best surprise. I love this team and this laundromat. Thank you, boss!

d3r_birthday_c_off.speaker: Birthday Staff
d3r_birthday_c_off.text: An afternoon off on my birthday? That is genuinely the best gift. You always think of us as people first.

d3r_birthday_c_basic.speaker: Birthday Staff
d3r_birthday_c_basic.text: Thank you, boss. Appreciate it. Back to work then.

d3r_birthday_result_surprise.speaker: Mentor
d3r_birthday_result_surprise.text: Celebrating your team as people — not just workers — creates belonging. That sense of family makes great teams stay together.

d3r_birthday_result_off.speaker: Mentor
d3r_birthday_result_off.text: Time is the most valuable gift you can give. Giving someone their time back signals you value them as a person.

d3r_birthday_result_basic.speaker: Mentor
d3r_birthday_result_basic.text: A simple acknowledgment is better than nothing. But small gestures on significant personal days have outsized impact.

d3r_supplier_bonus.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_bonus.text: You've been a reliable client. As a thank-you, we want to offer you a bonus shipment of premium detergent at no extra charge. Just say the word.

choices.text: Accept gratefully
Accept and ask what prompted this
Decline to maintain independence

d3r_supplier_c_accept.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_c_accept.text: It's on its way! Reliable partners deserve recognition. Hope this helps you serve your customers better.

d3r_supplier_c_ask.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_c_ask.text: Honestly? You always pay on time and treat our delivery staff with respect. That matters more than you know.

d3r_supplier_c_decline.speaker: Supplier
d3r_supplier_c_decline.text: I respect that. The offer stands if you change your mind.

d3r_supplier_result_accept.speaker: Mentor
d3r_supplier_result_accept.text: Reliability pays dividends you can't predict. Your consistent professionalism created this reward.

d3r_supplier_result_ask.speaker: Mentor
d3r_supplier_result_ask.text: Understanding why good things happen is as important as appreciating them. How you treat everyone defines your reputation.

d3r_supplier_result_decline.speaker: Mentor
d3r_supplier_result_decline.text: Maintaining independence is valid, but make sure it's not pride preventing you from accepting genuine goodwill.

d3e3_marketing_choice.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_marketing_choice.text: Midday. You have a chance to invest in marketing for your laundromat. It'll cost money but could bring in new customers.

d3e3_marketing_b.speaker: You
d3e3_marketing_b.text: Marketing could really help us grow, but I need to think about where to put the budget...

choices.text: Invest in social media ads
Print flyers and distribute in the neighborhood
Host a small in-store event (free wash day)
Skip marketing and save the money

d3e3_marketing_social.speaker: New Customer
d3e3_marketing_social.text: I found you on social media! Your ads looked so good I had to come check out this laundromat.

d3e3_marketing_flyers.speaker: Neighbor
d3e3_marketing_flyers.text: I got your flyer this morning! Great timing — I was just looking for a laundromat nearby.

d3e3_marketing_event.speaker: Event Attendee
d3e3_marketing_event.text: A free wash day? This is amazing! I brought three friends along. We all love what you have here!

d3e3_marketing_skip.speaker: Staff
d3e3_marketing_skip.text: It's been pretty quiet today, boss. Not many new faces coming in lately.

d3e3_result_social.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_social.text: Digital marketing has incredible reach. A well-targeted ad can bring customers from far beyond your neighborhood.

d3e3_result_flyers.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_flyers.text: Never underestimate local marketing! Community presence builds trust that online ads can't always replicate.

d3e3_result_event.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_event.text: Experiential marketing is powerful! Events create memories and word-of-mouth that money can't buy directly.

d3e3_result_skip.speaker: Mentor
d3e3_result_skip.text: Saving is wise, but growth requires investment. Without visibility, new customers can't find you.

d3e4_a.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_a.text: End of a busy day. Your staff is tired, but a last-minute customer needs help with a large load.

d3e4_staff_b.speaker: You
d3e4_staff_b.text: The team looks exhausted, but this customer has been waiting patiently.

choices.text: Help the customer yourself — let the team rest
Ask the team to stay late for overtime pay
Tell the customer to come back tomorrow

d3e4_help.speaker: Customer
d3e4_help.text: Thank you so much for staying late yourself. This means a lot.

d3e4_overtime.speaker: Staff
d3e4_overtime.text: Overtime pay helps, but we're really tired, boss.

d3e4_turnaway.speaker: Customer
d3e4_turnaway.text: Tomorrow? I needed this done today. Very disappointing.

d3e4_result_help.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_result_help.text: Leading from the front builds team respect that no speech ever could. Your willingness to get your hands dirty sets the culture.

d3e4_result_overtime.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_result_overtime.text: Overtime solves short-term needs but burns out your team. Balance is key.

d3e4_result_turnaway.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_result_turnaway.text: Turning away customers damages reputation. A little extra effort can create a loyal regular.

d3e4_a_stocked.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_a_stocked.text: Remember that bulk order you made on Day 1? It's paying off today. Your fully stocked supply closet handled the Day 3 rush perfectly.

d3e4_stocked_b.speaker: You
d3e4_stocked_b.text: The bulk supplies from Day 1 meant we never ran out of detergent today. Now I have leftover stock and a decision to make.

choices.text: Run a promotion using the extra supplies
Save it for tomorrow — stay conservative
Donate excess to a local shelter

d3e4_stocked_promo.speaker: Customer
d3e4_stocked_promo.text: A promotion this late in the day? Perfect timing! I was just about to leave, but this kept me here.

d3e4_stocked_save.speaker: Staff
d3e4_stocked_save.text: Smart call. Having buffer supplies tomorrow means we start the day confident instead of anxious.

d3e4_stocked_donate.speaker: Community Member
d3e4_stocked_donate.text: You donated your extra supplies? That's incredible. This laundromat truly cares about the community.

d3e4_stocked_result_promo.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_stocked_result_promo.text: Your Day 1 bulk order created an opportunity you couldn't have had otherwise. Forward-thinking decisions compound over time.

d3e4_stocked_result_save.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_stocked_result_save.text: Buffer stock is a strategic asset. Your Day 1 investment in inventory is now your operational safety net.

d3e4_stocked_result_donate.speaker: Mentor
d3e4_stocked_result_donate.text: Community generosity creates the kind of reputation that no marketing budget can buy. Your Day 1 bulk order just became a community relations win.

d3e5_day_end.speaker: Mentor
d3e5_day_end.text: End of Day 3. A local business owner wants to thank you for keeping the neighborhood clean.

d3e5_thanks.speaker: Business Owner
d3e5_thanks.text: Your laundromat has made a difference in this community. I wanted to personally thank you. What's your plan for the future?

choices.text: Share your growth plans enthusiastically
Be humble — say you're taking it day by day
Ask for their advice on local business

d3e5_share.speaker: Business Owner
d3e5_share.text: I love the vision! Let me know if you ever need a business reference.

d3e5_humble.speaker: Business Owner
d3e5_humble.text: One day at a time is valid. You're doing great work here.

d3e5_advice.speaker: Business Owner
d3e5_advice.text: Happy to help! Join the local business association — great networking there.

d3e5_result_share.speaker: Mentor
d3e5_result_share.text: Sharing your vision builds community support. People invest in people with plans.

d3e5_result_humble.speaker: Mentor
d3e5_result_humble.text: Humility is admirable. Sometimes letting your work speak is enough.

d3e5_result_advice.speaker: Mentor
d3e5_result_advice.text: Asking for help shows wisdom, not weakness. Building relationships with other business owners creates a support network.
